src/commands/decision-retire.ts#runDecis.reason: guard.abs comes from inspectDecisionMd which uses resolveSymlinkFreeProjectPath; the stale guard verifies identity before delete

src/commands/phase-archive.ts#runPhaseAr.reason: guard.abs comes from inspectPhaseYaml which uses resolveSymlinkFreeProjectPath; the stale guard verifies identity before delete

src/commands/init.ts#exists.reason: p parameter is from resolveInitPath (local wrapper of resolveSymlinkFreeProjectPath); init command creates project structure from fixed relative segments

src/commands/init.ts#writeIfAbsent.reason: p parameter is from resolveInitPath (local wrapper of resolveSymlinkFreeProjectPath); init command creates project structure from fixed relative segments

src/commands/init.ts#mkdirp.reason: p parameter is from resolveInitPath (local wrapper of resolveSymlinkFreeProjectPath); init command creates project directories from fixed relative segments

src/commands/phase-import.ts#runPhaseImp.reason: inputPath is an explicit user-selected file path from CLI --input flag
